title: alyssum montanum var. psammeum
intro: Alyssum montanum var. psammeum, also known as rock alyssum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb with white or pink flowers, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Rock alyssum can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its health benefits.
